title: vendor: update container-libs, and runtime-spec
body:
This also vendors tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface[/specs-go].

Similar Podman PR: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27579/

comments.body: @containers/buildah-maintainers I think it would be nice to keep main branch go.mod not tied to container-libs versions as that effectively disables future renovate jobs. Branching a new release- branch from main and then cutting a new release from that branch as in podman should make that work.
